name: remempalace
description: Full-lifecycle memory plugin for OpenClaw, powered by MemPalace. Fast (persistent MCP), token-aware (tiered injection), complete (diary + KG lifecycle).

mcpPythonBin.description: Path to the Python binary that has the `mempalace` package installed. Defaults to `python3` on PATH; pipx users should point this at their venv python (e.g. ~/.local/share/pipx/venvs/mempalace/bin/python).

bundleTtlMs.description: TTL (ms) for the intent-keyed recall bundle cache. Defaults to 180 000 (3 min). Same-intent follow-up prompts reuse cached bundles within this window.

knownEntities.description: Extra entity names always considered for KG lookup (appended to the built-in list).

identityMaxTokens.description: Token budget for the compacted identity block.

rawIdentity.description: Inject raw SOUL.md/IDENTITY.md text instead of the compacted form.

fastRaceMs.description: Window (ms) to wait for a precomputed recall bundle before falling back to cheap mode. Long enough to use an already-resolved promise; short enough to never block on a fresh MCP round-trip.

localDir.description: Directory for local JSONL diary fallback. Supports ~ expansion. Default: ~/.mempalace/palace/diary

replayOnStart.description: Replay pending local diary entries to MemPalace when MCP becomes available.

invalidateOnConflict.description: Call mempalace_kg_invalidate on existing facts when a conflicting single-value predicate is learned.

minConfidence.description: Minimum confidence score (0–1) for a structured fact to be written to the KG.

fromAssistant.description: Extract KG facts from assistant output. Disabled by default to reduce memory poisoning risk.

soulPath.description: Path to SOUL.md. Supports ~ expansion. Default: ~/SOUL.md

identityPath.description: Path to IDENTITY.md. Supports ~ expansion. Default: ~/IDENTITY.md

maxChars.description: Maximum characters to read from identity files.

allowedReadRoots.description: Filesystem roots the memory runtime is allowed to read. Supports ~ expansion. Default: [~/.mempalace, ~/.openclaw/workspace]

allowedWriteRoots.description: Filesystem roots the memory runtime is allowed to write. Supports ~ expansion. Default: []

enabled.description: Enable persisting the hot recall bundle cache to disk across restarts.

path.description: Path for the hot cache snapshot file. Supports ~ expansion. Default: ~/.mempalace/remempalace/hot-cache.json

maxEntries.description: Maximum number of bundle cache entries to persist.

flushIntervalMs.description: How often (ms) to flush the hot cache to disk during a session.
